reason: Backend spec entrypoint; contains the pre-development checklist and links to required coding guidelines for this task.
Explains backend module layout and where shared identity / scoring helpers should live.
Confirms provider adapters should stay focused on upstream mapping and not absorb cross-provider aggregation identity logic.
Defines RRF and scoring behavior; this task changes identity semantics used during dedup and final SearchResult output.
Testing and TypeScript quality expectations for updating regression coverage around empty-url identity collisions.
